item.name: Spectral Megalodon
item.description:
Due to the fact that most of its prey are petrified upon catching sight of this ominously glowing predator, it has rather an easy time finding a steady supply of food.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 4 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: As if being made of pure muscle and armed with rows of razor-sharp teeth was not imposing enough, this apex predator is blessed with an ominous, spectral glow. It seems unconcerned by the fact this alerts prey of its approach, as attempts to flee are almost guaranteed to end in failure. Perhaps this is nature's way of giving its next meal a sporting chance.
